description: The chatMutation.onError handler at line 104 wraps error handling in try/catch but doesn't log the caught error or provide fallback behavior. If getErrorMessage() throws or message state update fails, the user gets no feedback that their message failed. Should log errors and always show a fallback error message.
successCriteria: All caught exceptions in error handlers are logged to console.error with context
A fallback error message is always displayed to the user even if error parsing fails
Error state is set in a way that can't throw (e.g., using a constant fallback message)
